data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Boosts US Steel Stake By 143%: Is He Betting On Merger?
data.description: Druckenmiller increased stake in United States Steel as company explores merger options. Company's stock up 25% due to Trump's tariffs.

data.title: Record-Breaking High-Risk Bitcoin Whale Allegedly Outed As UK Fraudster With Casino Theft History
data.description: On-chain investigator ZachXBT has linked the Hyperliquid whale, a trader who profited $20 million through high-leverage crypto trades, to a British online fraudster.

data.title: Amentum Faces Growth Slump As Government Cuts Spending, Analyst Expects Merger To Boost Margins
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst Noah Poponak initiated coverage on Amentum Holdings with a Neutral Rating, and a price forecast of $21.

data.title: Why Avista, Hershey, And Virtus Investment Partners Are Winners For Passive Income
Trump Administration Failed To Respond To Court Order On Deportation Flights: Explain Non-Compliance By Tuesday, Says Judge
data.description: A federal judge criticized the Trump administration for failing to provide sufficient details on Venezuelan deportation flights and missing a court-ordered deadline.
